title: Why Your Real Estate Website Might Be Costing You Deals
description: A first-person post about how an outdated or low-performing website signals the wrong things to potential clients, and what Gregg did about it.
primary_keyword: real estate agent website Orange County
guiding_questions: Have you ever lost a deal because of how you looked online? What happened?
What do most agents get wrong about their web presence?
What would you tell a friend who asked you why this matters?
